overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit urban environment. The player moves from a covered pedestrian walkway through an open intersection with towering skyscrapers and traditional hanging lanterns, crosses a street with passing vehicles, and enters a shaded corridor beneath an overpass.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk past various storefronts including a pawn shop with yellow signage

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a bench near the tree planter on the right side

entered.detail: overhanging structure providing partial shade over the sidewalk with various shop entrances
building facade with large circular industrial fans and ventilation equipment
yellow sign reading 'RADO PAWN SHOP' on the building facade
tall turquoise and blue glass skyscraper dominating the skyline ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a covered urban sidewalk in a cyberpunk city. The player passes by a pawn shop with yellow signage on the left while a building with large industrial ventilation fans sits on the right. A person is seated on a bench near a tree planter. The distant turquoise skyscraper looms ahead, visible through the gap between buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban intersection with traditional hanging lanterns

events.description: exits the covered pedestrian walkway into the open intersection with full sky visibility
camera tilts upward to look at the large hanging lanterns and towering skyscrapers overhead

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the intersection, then looking up to observe the architecture and hanging lanterns

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing at the intersection waiting to cross

entered.detail: large cylindrical traditional-style lanterns with Japanese characters suspended over the intersection
outdoor escalator or stairway structure attached to the building on the right
painted crosswalk lines on the asphalt marking the pedestrian crossing area

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the covered walkway into a bright open intersection. The camera tilts up to reveal large traditional hanging lanterns suspended overhead against a clear blue sky, with the massive turquoise glass skyscraper dominating the center view. Two pedestrians stand at the crosswalk ahead. The industrial fan building recedes into the distance on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with vehicle traffic and approaching overpass

events.description: small black futuristic vehicle passes by from left to right in front of the camera
approaching and entering the shaded area beneath the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: crossing the street while observing the passing vehicle, then continuing toward the overpass

notable_agents.action: small black futuristic compact car driving across the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: large concrete overpass or bridge structure spanning across the street ahead
green circular neon sign on the right side building, possibly indicating a store or bar
vent emitting steam or smoke from the street level near the crosswalk

segments.scene_description: The player crosses the open street as a small black futuristic vehicle drives past from left to right. The turquoise skyscraper shifts to the left as the camera advances toward a large overpass structure ahead. Steam rises from a vent in the street, and a green circular neon sign becomes visible on a storefront to the right. The environment transitions from open sky to the shadow of the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered street under overpass with commercial storefronts

events.description: entering significantly darker shaded area beneath the overpass with mixed artificial and natural lighting

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass past a storefront with a green neon sign and metal security gate

entered.detail: metal roll-down security gate partially covering the storefront entrance
elevated walkway or bridge connecting buildings on the left side

segments.scene_description: The player walks beneath the overpass into a shaded corridor with significantly darker lighting. The green neon sign is now close on the right, attached to a storefront with a metal security gate. Steam vents are visible on the left side of the street. The turquoise skyscraper is no longer visible, replaced by the concrete structure of the overpass overhead and connecting pedestrian bridges.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban sidewalk into a bright city intersection before descending into the shadows of a concrete overpass. It begins along a covered walkway, passing a pawn shop and industrial ventilation fans while a distant turquoise skyscraper looms through the gap between buildings. As the camera emerges from the cover, the scene opens into a wide intersection where the view tilts upward to reveal traditional hanging lanterns suspended against a clear blue sky. The camera then advances across the open street, passing a futuristic black vehicle and rising steam vents as the turquoise tower shifts out of center view. Finally, the environment transitions from the bright open air into a shaded corridor beneath a massive overpass, where the lighting darkens and the skyline is replaced by concrete structures and a glowing green neon sign.
